mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER(EMAIL, NAME, LOGIN_ID, PWD) VALUES (#{email},#{name},#{loginId}, #{pwd})
mapper.select: SELECT ID,LOGIN_ID, PWD FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE LOGIN_ID=#{loginId}
SELECT LOGIN_ID, NAME, EMAIL FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE LOGIN_ID=#{loginId}
SELECT ID FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE LOGIN_ID=#{loginId}
SELECT TM.NAME, TMP.AGE, TMP.REGION, TMP.MARRIAGE, TMP.MAIN_CATEGORY FROM TBL_MEMBER AS TM LEFT JOIN TBL_MEMBER_PLUS AS TMP ON TM.ID = TMP.MEMBER_ID WHERE TM.LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}
mapper.insert: insert into TBL_MEMBER_PLUS (MEMBER_ID, AGE, REGION, MARRIAGE, MAIN_CATEGORY) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{age}, #{region}, #{marriage}, #{mainCategory} )
